Durable Custom Dry Erase Magnets for Kitchen & Office Organization

Transform any magnetic surface into an interactive planning tool with our custom dry erase magnets. Perfect for refrigerator scheduling, office whiteboards, and magnetic surfaces throughout your home or workplace.

Our dry erase magnets feature professional-grade magnetic material that adheres securely to steel surfaces while providing a smooth writing experience. Each magnet includes protective lamination for long-lasting durability and easy cleaning.

Key Features:

  • 30 mil magnetic material for strong adhesion
  • Protective lamination included for durability
  • Full-color custom printing available
  • Maximum print size of 24" x 24"
  • Compatible with standard dry erase markers
  • Easy to clean and reuse repeatedly

Ideal for meal planning, chore charts, weekly schedules, project tracking, and any organization system that needs flexibility and reusability. Compatible with refrigerators, filing cabinets, whiteboards, and other magnetic-receptive surfaces.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Material Options for Custom Dry Erase Magnets

Our dry erase magnets are constructed with premium magnetic material designed for reliable performance on magnetic-receptive surfaces.

Magnetic Material Specifications:

  • 30 mil magnetic material: Provides strong adhesion to steel surfaces
  • Protective lamination: Included on all dry erase magnets for durability
  • Full-color printing: Vibrant, fade-resistant inks
  • Maximum size: Up to 24" x 24" for large format applications

Important Surface Compatibility:

Before ordering, verify that your intended surface is magnetic-receptive. Magnets will not adhere to aluminum, plastic, or non-ferrous materials. Test with a standard refrigerator magnet if uncertain about surface compatibility.

Writing Surface Quality:

The laminated surface provides smooth writing with standard dry erase markers and erases cleanly without ghosting or staining when properly maintained.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing & Cut Options for Dry Erase Magnets

Choose from multiple finishing options to optimize your dry erase magnet's performance and appearance.

Rounded Corners (Recommended):

  • Standard finishing option for most applications
  • Improves airflow over magnet surface
  • Reduces lifting and edge peeling
  • Ideal for refrigerator and mobile applications

Square Cut:

  • Clean, precise edges for professional appearance
  • Best for stationary installations
  • Maximizes printing area

Contour Cut:

  • Custom shape cutting available
  • Follows your design outline
  • Perfect for logo shapes and unique designs
  • May require additional setup time

For high-movement applications like vehicle magnets or frequently repositioned magnets, rounded corners provide the best durability and longevity.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Dry Erase Magnet Production & Turnaround Times

We offer flexible production timeframes to meet your scheduling needs, from rush orders to cost-saving extended timelines.

Production Time Options:

1 Business Day Priority:

  • Fastest turnaround for urgent projects
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process next business day
  • Emergency same-day rushes available in select cases
  • Contact customer service for same-day availability

2 Business Days Express:

  • Quick turnaround with slightly lower cost
  • Ideal for weekly planning implementations
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process next business day

3 Business Days Standard:

  • Most popular option - balances speed and value
  • Free standard production time
  • Perfect for most custom dry erase magnet projects

5 Business Days Saver:

  • Cost-effective option for advance planning
  • Best value when timing is flexible
  • Ideal for bulk orders and seasonal preparation

Important Timing Notes:

Production time begins when file upload is complete and approved. If proofs are requested, timing starts from proof approval. Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Options for Custom Dry Erase Magnets

All dry erase magnets require payment before production begins to ensure timely processing of your custom order.

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover
  • Business Checks: Must be received and cleared before production
  • Secure Processing: Your card is only charged after order approval

Payment Process:

  1. Complete your dry erase magnet design and specifications
  2. Review order details and pricing
  3. Approve final artwork and order summary
  4. Payment is processed and production begins

Check Payment Information:

For check payments, orders are held until payment clears. This may extend your total delivery time. Contact customer service for check payment procedures and mailing instructions.

Order Security:

We never charge your payment method until you have reviewed and approved your complete order, including artwork and specifications.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Dry Erase Magnet Orders

We provide reliable shipping options to get your custom dry erase magnets delivered safely and on schedule.

Standard Shipping Information:

  • Default Method: UPS Ground (unless specified otherwise)
  • Coverage: 1-3 day ground delivery to 90% of the United States
  • Tracking: Tracking number provided when package ships
  • Pricing: Based on package weight and destination

Large Order Considerations:

Additional shipping charges apply to oversized dry erase magnet orders. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before ordering if you have questions about shipping costs for large quantities.

Shipping Responsibility:

  • Shipping company terms apply once package is in transit
  • Delays due to weather or carrier issues are not refundable
  • Damaged goods must be returned for replacement
  • Lost packages are replaced after carrier completes investigation

International Shipping:

Contact customer service for international dry erase magnet shipping options and requirements.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Home & Office Uses for Custom Dry Erase Magnets

Custom dry erase magnets provide flexible organization solutions for any magnetic surface in your home, office, or business environment.

Kitchen & Home Organization:

  • Meal Planning: Weekly menu magnets on refrigerator doors
  • Chore Charts: Family responsibility tracking systems
  • Shopping Lists: Reusable grocery and errand lists
  • Schedule Coordination: Family calendar and activity tracking
  • Goal Tracking: Fitness, savings, or personal achievement charts

Office & Business Applications:

  • Project Tracking: Timeline and milestone management
  • Team Schedules: Staff availability and shift planning
  • Meeting Notes: Reusable agenda and action item boards
  • Inventory Management: Supply tracking on metal storage units
  • Process Documentation: Workflow steps on magnetic boards

Educational Uses:

  • Classroom Management: Student progress and behavior charts
  • Learning Activities: Interactive educational games and exercises
  • Assignment Tracking: Homework and project management boards

Compatible Surfaces:

Works on refrigerators, filing cabinets, whiteboards, magnetic bulletin boards, steel doors, and any magnetic-receptive surface. Test surface compatibility with a standard magnet before ordering.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Dry Erase Magnet Printing

Proper artwork preparation ensures the best printing quality for your custom dry erase magnets.

Preferred File Formats:

  • Vector Files: .eps files with fonts converted to outlines (best quality)
  • High-Resolution PDFs: 300 DPI minimum for crisp printing
  • JPEG Images: High-resolution files for photographic content

Design Considerations:

  • Writing Areas: Leave blank or lightly colored areas for dry erase use
  • Text Size: Ensure text is readable at final magnet size
  • Color Matching: Consider our Color Match Proof System for critical colors
  • Bleed Areas: Allow extra space for cutting tolerances

Professional Design Assistance:

Unsure about your file quality? Our graphic designers can help optimize your artwork for the best printing results. We can also create custom designs based on your specifications.

Proofing Options:

  • Order Proofs: Review artwork, pricing, and order details before production
  • Color Match Proofs: Physical color samples for critical color matching
  • Approval Required: Production begins only after you approve the final proof

Contact customer service if you need guidance on artwork preparation or want to discuss custom design services for your dry erase magnet project.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What are your custom dry erase magnets made of?

Our dry erase magnets are made with 30 mil magnetic material and include protective lamination. This combination provides strong magnetic adhesion and a durable writing surface that works with standard dry erase markers and erases cleanly.

Do you offer custom sizes and custom shapes for dry erase magnets?

Yes, we can create dry erase magnets in custom sizes up to 24" x 24". We also offer contour cutting for custom shapes. Square cut and rounded corner options are available, with rounded corners recommended for better durability.

Can I upload my own artwork for a custom dry erase magnet?

Absolutely! You can upload your own print-ready files in .eps, .pdf, or high-resolution .jpg formats. Vector files with fonts converted to outlines provide the best print quality. Our design team can also help optimize your artwork.

What's the difference between standard and reflective custom dry erase magnets?

Our standard dry erase magnets feature full-color printing on magnetic material with protective lamination. We focus on providing the highest quality standard dry erase magnets rather than specialty reflective options.

What are common uses for dry erase fridge magnets?

Popular uses include meal planning, family chore charts, shopping lists, weekly schedules, goal tracking, and any reusable organizational system. They're perfect for kitchens, offices, classrooms, and anywhere you need flexible planning tools.

What surfaces do dry erase magnets stick to best?

Dry erase magnets work best on steel surfaces like refrigerators, filing cabinets, whiteboards, and magnetic boards. They will not stick to aluminum, plastic, or non-ferrous materials. Test with a regular magnet if you're unsure about surface compatibility.

Is there a minimum order quantity for custom dry erase magnets?

We can accommodate single custom dry erase magnets as well as large quantity orders. Contact customer service for pricing on bulk orders or special quantity requirements.

Can I use custom dry erase magnets on a vehicle or outdoors?

While our dry erase magnets are durable, they're designed primarily for indoor applications like refrigerators and office environments. For outdoor or vehicle use, consider our dedicated magnetic signs which are specifically engineered for those conditions.

Are dry erase fridge magnets waterproof?

Our dry erase magnets include protective lamination that provides moisture resistance for typical indoor use. They can handle kitchen humidity and light cleaning, but they're not designed for submersion or heavy water exposure.

What markers can I use on a custom dry erase magnet (and how do I clean it)?

Use standard dry erase markers for best results. Clean with a dry cloth or standard whiteboard eraser for regular maintenance. For deeper cleaning, use whiteboard cleaner or mild soap with a soft cloth. Avoid abrasive cleaners that could damage the laminated surface.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
